title: B.Sc (Hons. with Research) in Biochemistry
content: *4-year Undergraduate Degree (Honours with Research) S. No. | Broad Category of Course | Minimum Credit Requirement for a4-Year UG Programme | 1 | Major (Core) | 80 | 2 | Minor Stream | 32 | 3 | Multidisciplinary | 09 | 4 | Ability Enhancement Courses (AEC) | 08 | 5 | Skill Enhancement Courses (SEC) | 09 | 6 | Value Added Courses common for all UG | 06-08 | 7 | Summer Internship | 02-04 | 8 | Research Project/ Dissertation | 12 | 9 | Total | 160 | 4-year UG Degree with Honours (Source: - UGC Curriculum & Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons) Biochemistry Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 In addition to all the objectives outlined in the regular Honours program, the B.Sc. (Hons. with Research) Biochemistry program is specifically designed to cultivate research aptitude and innovation in students. 02 It aims to develop competencies in scientific inquiry, experimental design, and the use of research methodologies and statistical tools. 03 The program emphasizes the use of advanced instrumentation and computational tools, such as PCR, HPLC, ELISA, and bioinformatics software, which are essential in modern biochemical research. 04 To impart in-depth theoretical and practical knowledge of biochemistry and interdisciplinary life science fields with a focus on research methodologies. 05 To train students in independent scientific inquiry by engaging them in long-term research projects, experimental design, and data interpretation. 06 To develop skills in scientific communication and publication through manuscript writing, conference presentations, and collaborative research. 07 To strengthen analytical and critical reasoning abilities for innovative problem-solving and translational research. 08 To prepare students for leadership roles in research institutions, biotech industries, and healthcare sectors. 09 To encourage progression to doctoral studies and research-based careers at national and international levels. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the concepts of biochemistry through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biochemical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates of biochemistry will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge and Problem Analysing: The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the concepts of biochemistry through application-based learning and to apply the knowledge in analyzing the problems related to various fields of life sciences for their solutions and enhances overall development and also equip with advanced biochemical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude with problem solving skills. 02 Formulation and Design: The graduates will be trained to handle the advanced techniques of biochemistry to formulate the solutions of variety of problems related to the real life and will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing and continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organizations. XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons) Biochemistry Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
